title: Webhook-Driven Crypto Payment Fulfillment: What It Actually Is and How It Works — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: USDT, BTC, ETH, SOL, and 300+ coins. Get paid in seconds, convert locally, and keep 100% of your revenue minus network fees.

content.text: If you're a digital creator in Nigeria, Ghana, or Kenya, you know the pain of not being able to sell your ebooks, courses, or software on PayPal, Stripe, or Gumroad due to geographic restrictions. You've tried to receive USDT payments, only to wait for what feels like an eternity for the funds to settle. But what if you could take control of your sales and get paid instantly, without relying on intermediaries? That's where Webhook-Driven Crypto Payment Fulfillment comes in, and in this post, we'll break down what it is, how it works, and how you can use it to get paid for your digital products.
What This Actually Is and Why It Matters

Webhook-Driven Crypto Payment Fulfillment is a technology that allows digital creators to receive cryptocurrency payments directly from their customers, without the need for a traditional payment processor like PayPal or Stripe. This means that you can sell your digital products to anyone, anywhere in the world, without worrying about geographic restrictions or payment delays. The key to this technology is the webhook, which is a message sent by the payment processor to your website when a payment is made, triggering the automated delivery of your digital product.
How the Technology Works Under the Hood

The Core Shop Engine, a key component of this technology, is a full backend that includes a bot engine, automated delivery, payment verification, and PDF receipts. When a customer makes a payment, the webhook is triggered, sending a message to the Core Shop Engine, which then verifies the payment and delivers the digital product to the customer. This process happens in real-time, without the need for human intervention. The beauty of this technology is that it works everywhere, even in countries with restricted access to traditional payment processors.
Who This Is Built For and Why

This technology is built for digital creators who want to take control of their sales and get paid instantly, without relying on intermediaries. Whether you're selling ebooks, courses, software, or other digital products, you can use Webhook-Driven Crypto Payment Fulfillment to receive payments directly from your customers. This technology is particularly useful for creators in countries with restricted access to traditional payment processors, such as Nigeria, Ghana, and Kenya.
Webhook-Driven Crypto Payment Fulfillment is a game-changer for digital creators in countries with restricted access to traditional payment processors.
The Components That Make It Work Together

The Core Shop Engine is the heart of this technology, but it's not the only component that makes it work. You'll also need a payment processor like NOWPayments, which supports over 300 cryptocurrencies, including Bitcoin, Ethereum, and USDT. The webhook is the message that sends between the payment processor and the Core Shop Engine, triggering the automated delivery of your digital product. Together, these components make it possible for you to receive cryptocurrency payments directly from your customers.
How to Use This Knowledge to Take Action

Now that you know how Webhook-Driven Crypto Payment Fulfillment works, it's time to take action. First, sign up for a NOWPayments account to receive cryptocurrency payments. Next, set up the Core Shop Engine, which is available for $49.99. Finally, create a digital product and use the Core Shop Engine to automate the delivery of that product when a payment is made. With Webhook-Driven Crypto Payment Fulfillment, you can take control of your sales and get paid instantly, without relying on intermediaries.
How do I receive crypto payments for my digital products?

USDT is the most practical starting point for digital product sales because it eliminates price volatility from the equation. Your buyer pays in USDT and you receive USDT — one dollar in equals one dollar received, minus Tron network fees of under one dollar per transaction. You do not need to manage exchange rate risk or time your conversions around market movements. When you are ready to convert to local currency, you use a P2P exchange — Binance P2P is available in most countries, and local exchanges exist in Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, Pakistan, and Bangladesh with good liquidity. The conversion to naira, cedis, shillings, or rupees takes 20-30 minutes on average. This is a complete, operational path from digital product sale to local currency in your hands.
You can receive cryptocurrency payments directly from your customers, without relying on intermediaries, using Webhook-Driven Crypto Payment Fulfillment.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

If you're interested in learning more about how to set up a digital products store using the Core Shop Engine, check out our setup guide at https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html. With the Core Shop Engine, you can create a store that accepts cryptocurrency payments directly from your customers, without the need for a traditional payment processor.
Your Action Checklist

To start using Webhook-Driven Crypto Payment Fulfillment, follow these steps: Set up a NOWPayments account to receive cryptocurrency payments. Install the Core Shop Engine on your website, available for $49.99. Create a digital product and use the Core Shop Engine to automate the delivery of that product when a payment is made. Link your payment processor to the Core Shop Engine to receive payments directly from your customers. Test your setup to ensure that payments are being processed correctly.
The Core Shop Engine is the key component of Webhook-Driven Crypto Payment Fulfillment, making it possible for you to automate the delivery of your digital products when a payment is made.
Core Shop Engine — $49.99. Full backend with bot engine, automated delivery, payment verification, and PDF receipts. No payment processor account required. Works everywhere.
